_comment: git-branch.json — the base/integration branch each repo derives feature branches from.
One consolidated file, identical in every workspace (lives at <workspace-root>/config/git-branch.json).
Keyed by repo FOLDER name; the same name uses the same branch across all products, so list it once.
USED BY: (1) /sync-repos — checks out the mapped branch and `git pull`s it on every repo;
(2) /implement — pulls this base branch before deriving `ai/<KEY>-<slug>` from it.
LOOKUP: if a repo is listed under `repositories`, that branch wins. If it is NOT listed, fall back to
`fallback_branches` in order and use the FIRST that exists on origin. If none exist, the repo is skipped.
AI-brains (*ai-brain*, *ai-knowledge-base*) are never synced and are intentionally omitted.
Edit this file to add a repo or change a branch — it is user-maintained. /start seeds it only if missing (never overwrites).
